reference.quote: Complete IT takeover and cleanup: stabilizing and modernizing a 40-person office network in less than 30 days.

items.quote: With the SIRONIC team, we finally sleep soundly: our IT systems run stably, quickly and securely. When issues arise, they respond immediately and explain everything in plain language – no tech jargon. It's rare to find such a reliable partner in the IT world.

We used to have constant issues with computers and the network, but since we entrusted SIRONIC with our IT, everything runs smoothly. They help quickly, regardless of the problem, and we always find solutions with them. This is exactly the kind of support every company needs.

SIRONIC created a modern, clean and mobile-friendly website for us that not only looks great, but helps our clients find us online easily. They've handled maintenance ever since – every update and modification happens quickly and precisely. We received comprehensive, professional service.

We wanted a clean, fast and modern website – SIRONIC delivered exactly that. Professional team, attention to detail, and they always have great ideas to make the result even better. Our new website perfectly reflects our company's identity.

items.question: What businesses do you serve?
items.answer: SIRONIC primarily serves small and medium-sized businesses with 5–100 employees, operating in Hungary or across the EU. We also handle larger projects — just ask.

items.question: How is SIRONIC different from other IT providers?
items.answer: Most IT providers fix things after they break. We monitor proactively, so most issues are resolved before you notice them. You also get the same person every time — someone who actually knows your setup.

items.question: How fast do you react to an error report?
items.answer: For contracted partners: within 1–4 hours on standard issues. Critical incidents (server down, security breach): immediate response, 24/7.

items.question: Do you undertake on-site visits or only provide remote support?
items.answer: Yes, both! We resolve most errors remotely, but if necessary, we also go to the site personally.

items.question: Do you create websites completely from scratch?
items.answer: Yes — from scratch, with custom design using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. No templates, no page builders. Starting from €250 + VAT.

items.question: What is CRM Pro and how does it help my business?
items.answer: CRM Pro is a custom-developed customer management system that makes sales processes transparent, automates administration, and can be integrated with existing systems. Available in a price range accessible to smaller companies too.

items.question: What security measures do you apply?
items.answer: We use modern firewalls, data backup solutions, encryption, and access management. We design all our systems to be GDPR-compliant, so data security is default.

items.question: In what form can we contract with you?
items.answer: We work in two main constructions: ad-hoc assignment (for occasional tasks) and monthly maintenance contract (permanent operation and support). Both are transparent, with fixed pricing.

items.question: How much does website or system development cost?
items.answer: Basic websites start from 250,000 HUF, while the price of unique systems or CRM solutions is determined depending on functionality. We give a precise price quote before every project.

items.question: Why is it worth choosing cloud-based solutions?
items.answer: The cloud is fast, secure, and flexible – no need to maintain your own server, data is always available, and expansion can be solved in moments.

aboutPage.title: About Us
intro: Sironic was founded during the COVID period, when businesses had to rethink IT overnight. Since then we've grown steadily — not by pitching, but by being the kind of IT partner that clients keep.

We're based in Székesfehérvár, Hungary, and work with businesses across 16 EU countries — remotely and on-site. We're not a call centre, a franchise, or a ticket system. We're a small team that picks up the phone.
Whether it's system management, network infrastructure, data security, or custom software — every IT solution is handled by the same team, in plain language.

mission.title: SIRONIC's Mission
paragraphs: We know that for a small or medium-sized business, IT shouldn't be an obstacle – it just has to work, every day, flawlessly. A downtime, a slow network, or an outdated security setting can cause serious losses today.

That's why we created SIRONIC IT Solutions: to make professional yet affordable IT background available to every company. You don't need to hire your own system administrator, you don't need to build complex or expensive infrastructure – we take care of everything.

Our services cover the entire IT operation: system management, network building, data backup, IT security, firewall management, web development, and IT training. We always adapt to current technologies, so our clients can be sure their business IT systems are up-to-date and secure.
SIRONIC provides not just IT – but peace of mind, predictability, and support. We are the ones you can reach anytime if there's a problem – and often we solve it before you even notice.
We treat every client as a partner, not just maintaining their systems, but caring for their operations in the long term.

euPresence.title: European IT Presence – Support Without Borders
paragraphs: SIRONIC operates not only in Hungary – we have a European-wide presence, supporting businesses with both remote and on-site IT services across the EU. Whether it's custom software development or system operations, our team is ready to assist anywhere in the European Union.

Our remote-first operations enable us to provide IT support in 16 languages and respond quickly to any European client's needs. With modern project management tools and communication platforms, distance is no barrier.

Our services are used by SMBs operating in multiple EU member states – from custom application development to IT consulting. Whether it's German, Austrian, Slovak, Czech, Polish, or Romanian market presence, SIRONIC helps ensure your IT infrastructure remains competitive across the EU.

items.question: What is NIS2 and who does it apply to?
items.answer: NIS2 (Network and Information Security Directive 2) is an EU cybersecurity regulation that applies to essential and important entities across critical sectors. It mandates specific security measures, incident reporting, and regular audits.

items.question: Does SIRONIC perform NIS2 audits?
items.answer: No. SIRONIC designs, builds, and operates NIS2-compliant IT systems. We prepare your organization for external audits with complete documentation and expert guidance. However, the audits themselves must be conducted by independent, certified auditors as required by NIS2 regulations.

items.question: How long does NIS2 implementation take?
items.answer: Typically 3-6 months depending on your current infrastructure and compliance gaps. We provide a detailed timeline after the initial assessment.

items.question: What happens if we don't comply with NIS2?
items.answer: Non-compliance can result in significant fines (up to €10 million or 2% of global turnover), operational restrictions, and reputational damage. NIS2 is mandatory for covered entities.

items.question: Can you help with ongoing compliance after initial implementation?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer ongoing compliance support including 24/7 monitoring, incident response, regular security updates, documentation updates, and preparation for periodic audits.

items.question: Do you work with companies outside Hungary?
items.answer: Yes. We provide NIS2 compliance services across the EU. All our solutions are designed for EU-wide deployment with GDPR compliance and multilingual support.

items.question: What's included in the audit preparation?
items.answer: We create all required documentation (policies, procedures, network diagrams), collect evidence of compliance, prepare staff for interviews, and provide expert guidance throughout the external audit process.

items.question: How much does NIS2 compliance cost?
items.answer: Costs vary based on your infrastructure size and complexity. After a free initial assessment, we provide a detailed quote. Typical projects range from €15,000 to €50,000+ for initial implementation, plus ongoing support.

items.question: Do you work with clients outside Hungary?
items.answer: Absolutely. We work remotely with clients across the EU (Austria, Germany, Slovakia, Czech Republic, Romania, and more). All communication in English, German, or other EU languages. We can also provide on-site kickoff meetings if needed.

items.question: What if I only have a rough idea, not detailed requirements?
items.answer: That's completely normal. We start with a free discovery call to understand your business challenge. We'll help you refine requirements, prioritize features, and define a realistic scope.

items.question: Are your solutions GDPR-compliant?
items.answer: Yes. All software we build follows GDPR best practices: data minimization, user consent management, right to deletion, and EU-based hosting options. We can also assist with GDPR compliance consulting.

items.question: What's the payment structure?
items.answer: Typically 30% upfront, 40% at midpoint milestone, 30% at delivery. For ongoing projects, we can also work on monthly retainers. All payments are invoiced (EU VAT-compliant).

items.question: Do you provide ongoing maintenance after launch?
items.answer: Yes. We offer maintenance packages starting at €200/month covering updates, bug fixes, security patches, and minor enhancements.  We don't build and disappear — we're here for the long term.

items.question: Can you integrate with our existing systems (CRM, ERP, etc.)?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have experience integrating with Salesforce, HubSpot, SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, custom APIs, and more. We'll assess integration complexity during discovery.

items.question: What if we need changes or new features after launch?
items.answer: We provide ongoing development services. You can request enhancements via monthly retainer or one-off project pricing. We prioritize existing clients for urgent requests.

items.question: How do you ensure code quality and security?
items.answer: We follow industry best practices: TypeScript for type safety, code reviews, automated testing, security audits, and regular dependency updates. All code is documented and version-controlled (Git).

items.question: Can you help us migrate from an old system to a modern one?
items.answer: Yes. We've successfully migrated clients from WordPress, PHP, .NET, and legacy systems to modern Next.js/React stacks. We plan migrations carefully to ensure zero downtime and data integrity.

items.question: Do you work in Agile/Scrum?
items.answer: Yes. We use agile methodology with weekly check-ins, incremental deliveries, and continuous feedback loops. You're involved throughout, not just at the end.

cybersecurityPage.riskBanner: The average cost of a data breach for a European SMB exceeds €200,000. Most incidents involve employees, not sophisticated hackers.

pain.title: Most SMBs are one mistake away from a serious incident.
pain.subtitle: These vulnerabilities are more common than you think — and most are preventable.
items: An employee clicks a phishing link and nobody notices for 3 weeks.
Your firewall ruleset hasn't been reviewed since it was installed.
Remote workers are connecting from personal, unmanaged laptops.
You're not sure what data you hold or where it lives.
Your company falls under NIS2 — but nobody owns the compliance process.
Former employees still have active accounts in your systems.

solution.title: Security that's actually appropriate for your business size and risk level.

services.title: Security Audit & Risk Assessment
services.description: We map your current posture: devices, access controls, firewall, email security, and backup integrity. You receive a prioritised remediation roadmap.

services.description: EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) deployment, anti-malware, patch management, and mobile device policies across all managed endpoints.

services.title: Identity & Access Management
services.description: MFA rollout, privileged access review, Active Directory hardening, and proper offboarding procedures. We close the doors attackers use most.

services.title: Network Security Hardening
services.description: Firewall rules review, network segmentation, intrusion detection, and encrypted remote access built on our network engineering expertise.

services.title: NIS2 Compliance Support
services.description: We help companies understand and implement the technical controls required by the EU NIS2 directive. Not legal advice — practical IT implementation.

services.title: Security Awareness Training
services.description: Simulated phishing campaigns and staff training. The human layer is your most important security control.

items.question: We're a 20-person company. Do we actually need this?
items.answer: If you process client data, accept online payments, or fall under any EU sector regulation — yes. Attackers target small businesses specifically because defenses are weaker.

items.answer: It depends on your sector and size. We start with a scoping session to determine if and how NIS2 applies to your business, then help you build a compliant security posture from the ground up.

items.question: Can you respond to an active security incident?
items.answer: We have incident response capabilities for managed clients. For new clients, we conduct an emergency assessment and implement immediate containment steps.

items.question: Do you sell security products?
